title: Project Report: Personal Portfolio SPA — Frontend React Developer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: React + Vite portfolio with responsive layout, React Router pages, and contact form.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Beginner)*

**Personal Portfolio SPA** is a beginner-level end-to-end project for Frontend React Developer. Duration: 2 weeks. React + Vite portfolio with responsive layout, React Router pages, and contact form. Tools: React 19, Vite, React Router, Tailwind.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: 3 routed pages (Home, Projects, Contact)
Objective: Responsive CSS/Tailwind layout
Objective: Deploy to Vercel/Netlify
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Frontend React Developer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Frontend React Developer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Frontend React Developer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Setup
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Setup** *(Level: Beginner)*

Vite + React + Router. Complete these tasks: Project structure; Navbar. Deliverable for this phase: Running dev server.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Project structure
- [ ] Navbar
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Setup is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### Where to use it

### Real use example

chapters.content:


chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Beginner)*

Submit all final deliverables: GitHub repo; Live site URL; Lighthouse report. Skills demonstrated: React, Routing, CSS. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: GitHub repo
Deliverable: Live site URL
Deliverable: Lighthouse report
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits GitHub repo and passes the rubric.
